data.description: Shareholding information shows entity A owns 15% of company B's shares. No other significant holdings reported.

data.title: EQT sells remaining stake in Kodiak Gas Services, a top gas compression provider in US. Company grew into one of largest in N. America under EQT ownership.
data.description: EQT has successfully concluded its departure from Kodiak Gas Services, a notable player in the gas compression sector known for its extensive service offerings. During EQT's tenure, Kodiak evolved into a major contract compression company in North America, becoming one of the largest in the region.

data.title: ProPharma opens new office in Hyderabad to support growth. Leading global provider of life sciences services. Odysse...
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina on December 11, 2025, ProPharma, a prominent global provider of regulatory, clinical, and compliance services for the life sciences sector and a part of Odyssey Investment Partners' portfolio, is utilizing a modern workspace to facilitate ongoing expansion and creativity.

data.title: MPM Medical introduces new collagen wound care kits & portal to aid patients with post-op & wound care.<Action: Enhance patient compliance & access. 100% bovine collagen kits available, aiming to improve compliance & access with HCPCS-compliant products & easy insurance verification. Launched in Mesquite, TX on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: A recently launched comprehensive solution in Mesquite, Texas, is now aiding post-operative and wound care patients by providing HCPCS-compliant collagen kits and facilitating straightforward insurance verification. MPM Medical, a prominent company in advanced wound care and producer of exclusively American-made 100% bovine products, revealed this development on December 11, 2025. This initiative aims to benefit patients requiring specialized care, enhancing efficiency and quality in treatment processes.

data.title: BEN, Skye Inteligencia LATAM, and KNOBLOCH Information Group collaborate to modernize healthcare in Mexico with Sovereign AI.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Wilmington, DE, and Mexico City, Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (Nasdaq: BNAI), known as BEN, announced a partnership with Skye Inteligencia LATAM and KNOBLOCH Information Group. BEN specializes in developing secure, governed multimodal AI solutions for regulated sectors. The collaboration aims to enhance healthcare services in Mexico, leveraging the expertise of all three companies to improve the industry.

data.title: Tanishq opens 8th US store in Tysons, Virginia - 5,500 sq. ft. showroom at 8065 Leesburg Pike.
data.description: In Tysons, Virginia, on December 11, 2025, Tanishq, a renowned fine jewelry brand from India, announced the opening of its eighth store in the U.S. The new location at 8065 Leesburg Pike, Suite 120, boasts a spacious 5,500 square foot showroom. The store officially opened its doors on August 8 and marked its entry into the market with a celebration.

data.title: Allegria Therapeutics in Basel, Switzerland secures USD 5.1M seed extension financing for mast cell-mediated diseases treatment.
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland on December 11, 2025, Allegria Therapeutics (ALLEGRIA), a Swiss biotech firm revolutionizing therapeutics for mast cell-mediated diseases, disclosed its accomplishment of a seed extension financing worth USD 5.1 million.

data.title: TripleLift finishes successful 2025 year with global expansion and partnerships in CTV, retail media, and programmatic, highlighting breakthroughs.
data.description: TripleLift, a top Creative SSP, is marking a successful year in 2025 with significant achievements. The year saw a notable global expansion, increased product innovation, and strong partnerships in CTV, retail media, and programmatic addressability. These developments have solidified TripleLift's leading position in the industry.

data.title: Egyptian Drug Authority permits Biomerica to provide their full range of screening tests for use.
data.description: This update shares that the local government reported a notable increase in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 500 new infections in the past week. This surge has raised the total number of confirmed cases in the region to 2,000. Additionally, the authorities announced that there have been 10 new fatalities related to the virus, bringing the total number of deaths to 50. In response to this concerning trend, the government has implemented stricter health and safety measures, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. The public is urged to adhere to these guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and protect the community.

data.title: Home Instead named to Newsweek's America's Best Customer Service 2026 list for in-home care for older adults.
data.description: In SAN MATEO, California, a leading in-home care provider for older adults, Home Instead, an Honor company, has secured a spot on Newsweek's prestigious America's Best Customer Service 2026 list. This recognition highlights Home Instead's commitment to delivering compassionate and tailored care, allowing seniors to age gracefully and happily within their residences. As the demand for top-notch in-home care for the elderly rises, this acknowledgment underscores Home Instead's dedication to quality service.

data.title: Jordan's top bank, Capital Bank, adopts Diebold Nixdorf's VCP-Pro 7 software for digital transformation. Efficient deployment and operations.
data.description: Diebold Nixdorf recently introduced VCP-Pro 7, which offers seamless customer journeys and streamlined deployment and operations. The leading financial institution in Jordan, Capital Bank, has embraced VCP-Pro 7. This innovative solution is designed to enhance customer experiences and operational efficiency. The announcement was made on December 11, 2025, in North Canton, Ohio. Diebold Nixdorf is listed on the NYSE under the symbol DBD.

data.title: J.S. Held releases survey results post-Fed meeting, revealing ongoing concern on political uncertainty. #LendingClimate
data.description: Survey findings revealed by Phoenix Management, a division of J.S. Held, demonstrate ongoing apprehension surrounding political ambiguity. The U.S. Federal Reserve's recent assembly prompted the global consulting company to disclose conclusions on the "Lending Climate in" survey. This indicates persistent unease within the financial sector. The disclosed survey outcomes will include crucial insights into market sentiment and concerns among industry players. The details, made public on December 11, 2025, serve as a reflection of the current economic landscape.

data.title: GrantWatch adds 61st category: Tribal Nations Grants, aiming to expand access; leading grants site since 2010.
data.description: GrantWatch, a prominent grants website, headquartered in Boynton Beach, Florida, made a significant announcement on December 11, 2025. The organization, known as the leading grants website since 2010, introduced its latest grant category, Tribal Nations Grants. This move signifies a major milestone in GrantWatch's 15-year endeavor to enhance accessibility and equality in grants distribution. With this 61st grant category, GrantWatch aims to empower tribal nations and address their specific needs, further diversifying its grant offerings. This strategic expansion demonstrates GrantWatch's commitment to ensuring that financial support reaches communities that need it the most.

data.title: XBP Global secures 5-year deal worth up to 21.5 million Euro with IT service provider BG-Phoenics GmbH in Germany.
data.description: Frankfurt, Germany - On December 11, 2025, XBP Global Holdings, Inc. disclosed a significant development. The company, known for its expertise in workflow automation and innovative use of AI, has entered into a fresh five-year deal with a prominent IT service provider in Germany’s statutory accident insurance domain, BG-Phoenics GmbH. This agreement, valued at approximately 21.5 million Euro, underscores XBP Global's commitment to revolutionizing business process automation and digital transformation through its extensive industry knowledge and worldwide presence.

data.title: Pivot to manage Hotel Lincoln in Chicago's Old Town for Jordache Enterprises expanding Davidson Hospitality's lifestyle portfolio.
data.description: In a recent announcement on December 11, 2025, in Atlanta, Davidson Hospitality Group shared news of its expansion in the lifestyle sector by incorporating an upscale boutique hotel into its portfolio. Pivot, the specific lifestyle operating division of Davidson Hospitality Group, is set to oversee the operations of Hotel Lincoln, JdV by Hyatt after being chosen by Jordache Enterprises. This boutique hotel is located in a prime location and marks a significant addition to Davidson Hospitality Group's offerings.

data.title: ONELIFE Senior Living commits to SafelyYou before pilot ends, ensuring safer care through AI technology.
data.description: A company named ONELIFE Senior Living in San Francisco has revealed their commitment to utilizing SafelyYou, a leading provider specializing in promoting a safer and more patient-focused approach to care for seniors. ONELIFE Senior Living has chosen to implement SafelyYou's proven AI technology, innovative hardware solutions, and access to remote medical professionals across all their facilities. This decision was made prior to the completion of the pilot program, demonstrating the company's dedication to enhancing the well-being of their residents, staff, and families.

data.title: WEBTOON expands Creator Programs in 2026, provides enhanced support for careers and talent on its platform. #Nasdaq: WBTN #WEBTOONCreators.
data.description: Los Angeles-based WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (Nasdaq: WBTN) revealed plans for a significant expansion of its Creator Programs in 2026. The company, known for being a leading global entertainment firm with one of the largest storytelling platforms, is set to provide enhanced tools, support, and fresh opportunities to its creators. This initiative aims to assist creators in building their careers on WEBTOON effectively. The upcoming roll-out throughout 2026 will introduce various Creator support measures, such as increased monetization prospects, additional convention and event backing, and educational resources.

data.title: GTT chosen as global network partner by JYSK for digital transformation and international expansion.
data.description: A global networking and security service provider, GTT Communications Inc., has been chosen by international home furnishing retailer, JYSK, as its new global network partner. This significant partnership for JYSK's digital transformation will see a high-performance network utilizing GTT's global Tier 1 backbone and advanced WAN capabilities. The solution integrates Ethernet and Cloud Connec services to enhance connectivity. This move reflects JYSK’s commitment to evolving technologies to meet the demands of its multinational operations.
